target_game.name: TheSphinx
target_game.core_loop: The user asks yes/no questions via voice or text to an AI, analyzes the answers, and attempts to guess a secret famous person before running out of questions.
target_game.audience_proxy: Educated adults aged 25-45 who enjoy intellectual challenges, trivia, and sophisticated puzzle games.

palette.description: A dark, premium palette featuring a near-black background with glowing golden-yellow text and accents, creating a mysterious and sophisticated atmosphere.

top_archetypes.label: Satisfaction · live-action-UGC

centroid_hook.summary: A young man dances energetically in a blue-lit room, expressing his positive feelings after playing a mobile game.
centroid_hook.visual_action: A young man waves his arms above his head and dances to a beat in his room.
centroid_hook.text_overlay: how I feel after playing Crossword Go all night after school

top_archetypes.rationale: 1 creatives across 1 unique advertisers, average age 10d. Hook representative: "A young man dances energetically in a blue-lit room, expressing his positive fee"

top_archetypes.label: Satisfaction · mixed

centroid_hook.summary: A user is shown playing a digital jigsaw puzzle on a smartphone, dragging pieces from a selection tray at the bottom of the screen to assemble a picture of a landscape.
centroid_hook.visual_action: A close-up of a woman's hand holding a smartphone, with her finger dragging a puzzle piece from a horizontal scroll bar at the bottom onto the main puzzle area.

top_archetypes.rationale: 2 creatives across 2 unique advertisers, average age 94d. Hook representative: "A user is shown playing a digital jigsaw puzzle on a smartphone, dragging pieces"

top_archetypes.label: Asmr · 3D-render

centroid_hook.summary: Red pepper flakes are satisfyingly poured into a clear glass jar, accompanied by ASMR-like sounds.
centroid_hook.visual_action: A kitchen drawer opens, then a hand pours red pepper flakes from off-screen into a glass jar labeled 'RED PEPPER'.

top_archetypes.rationale: 1 creatives across 1 unique advertisers, average age 143d. Hook representative: "Red pepper flakes are satisfyingly poured into a clear glass jar, accompanied by"

game_fit_scores.rationale: Major friction on every axis: the blue-lit bedroom UGC palette and casual teen-dance energy directly contradict TheSphinx's mystical-minimalist black/gold premium aesthetic and tense/challenging mood. The hook shows post-play euphoria with zero gameplay surfacing, which fails to communicate the AI questioning/deduction loop or the celebrity-guessing payoff that actually sells this game. Audience skews young/casual ("after school") versus the educated 25-45 intellectual target — only run this if testing a deliberate counter-positioning experiment, otherwise skip in favor of voice-interaction or "can the AI guess who I'm thinking of" demonstration hooks.

Hard pass for TheSphinx. The bright pastel/green-blue jigsaw palette and tactile drag-and-drop satisfaction hook directly contradict the game's dark mystical-minimalism aesthetic, and the mechanic (spatial assembly) has zero overlap with voice-driven yes/no deduction about a hidden celebrity. Audience also skews casual relax-style puzzlers (often older/female-skewed jigsaw players) rather than the educated 25-45 intellectual-challenge crowd — don't adapt this archetype, the only salvageable idea would be replacing the jigsaw with a "piece-by-piece celebrity reveal" concept, which is effectively a different creative.

Hard pass. The archetype's pastel pink/red kitchen ASMR aesthetic clashes directly with TheSphinx's dark, mystical gold-on-black premium look, and pouring spices has zero conceptual bridge to a voice-driven Q&A celebrity-guessing loop. The ASMR/satisfying-pour audience skews casual scroll-hypnotists rather than the educated 25-45 trivia enthusiasts we need — don't adapt this template, the frictions are too deep to salvage.

brief.title: "It Guessed Me in 12 Questions" — Reaction UGC × Mystical Minimalism
brief.hook_3s: Candle-lit face, phone glowing gold: "I tried to outsmart an AI sphinx. It read my mind in 12 questions."
scene_flow: 0-3s HOOK: Educated 30-something sits in a dark room, only a warm gold phone-glow on their face. Smirk to camera. Overlay sets the dare.
3-7s SETUP: Over-the-shoulder of TheSphinx UI — black screen, glowing #D4A024 prompt 'Think of a famous person.' User whispers/taps a yes/no question. Golden answer pulses back.
7-11s ESCALATION: Quick-cut montage of 3 questions getting eerily specific ('Are they still alive?' → 'Did they win an Oscar?'). User's eyes widen, leans closer. Question counter ticks down in gold.
11-14s PAYOFF: Sphinx reveals the exact celebrity name in glowing #FCE588 serif type. User throws hands up — the satisfaction-archetype reaction beat — but contained, impressed, not goofy.
14-15s CTA: Logo lockup on near-black, gold CTA button pulses.
brief.visual_direction: Translate the archetype's bedroom-UGC energy into "premium midnight UGC": shoot handheld vertical in a dim room lit ONLY by the phone screen, so the user's face is washed in #D4A024 gold against #100D06 near-black negative space. Keep wardrobe muted (charcoal, black knit). All on-screen UI cards float in true black with hairline gold borders and #FCE588 highlight text in a refined serif — Mystical Minimalism, no clutter, no neon. Reaction beats stay restrained and intelligent (lean-in, raised brow, single fist-pump) rather than teen dance, matching the 25-45 intellectual audience while preserving the satisfaction payoff that makes the archetype work.
text_overlays: I challenged an AI to read my mind
I picked the most obscure celebrity I could think of
Question 7… how does it know this
brief.rationale: We're salvaging a low-fit archetype (20/15/25) by keeping its proven satisfaction-reaction structure but swapping bedroom-blue teen energy for a candle-lit, premium "I just got mind-read" beat that actually surfaces the AI questioning loop — the thing that sells this game. UA should test this against a pure gameplay-demo control; if reaction-style wins, it unlocks the UGC creator pipeline for an otherwise hard-to-UGC trivia title. Cap spend until CTR/IPM clears benchmark given the documented audience and tonal friction.
scenario_prompts: Hero frame, 9:16 vertical mobile ad still: a thoughtful 35-year-old in a charcoal sweater sitting in a pitch-black room, face lit only by the warm golden glow of a phone screen, eyes wide with disbelief, leaning toward camera. Mystical Minimalism visual style, premium cinematic UGC. Strict palette: near-black background #100D06, glowing golden-yellow #D4A024 light wash, #FCE588 highlight on the eyes. Elegant serif on-screen text overlay reads 'It guessed in 12.' in #FCE588. High contrast, shallow depth of field, grain.

Storyboard frame 2, 9:16 vertical: over-the-shoulder shot of a smartphone held in dim room, screen showing a minimalist trivia app UI on pure #100D06 black with a single glowing #D4A024 line of text 'Is your person still alive?' and a small gold question counter. Mystical Minimalism, hairline gold borders, no clutter. On-screen text overlay in elegant serif: 'Question 7… how does it know this' in #FCE588. Cinematic, mysterious, sophisticated.

Storyboard frame 3, 9:16 vertical: close-up of the same user mid-reaction, restrained fist-pump, half-smile of impressed defeat, phone glow painting their face gold. Background pure #100D06 near-black. Mystical Minimalism premium UGC aesthetic, palette locked to #100D06 / #D4A024 / #FCE588. Bold serif overlay across upper third: 'Outsmart The Sphinx' in glowing #FCE588. Vertical mobile ad framing, cinematic grain.

brief.title: The Reveal: Piece by Piece, Guess the Icon
brief.hook_3s: A glowing golden silhouette flickers in the dark — "I know who you're thinking of. Do you?"
scene_flow: 0-3s HOOK: Pitch-black screen. A faint golden silhouette of a famous face pulses into view, fragmented like shards of light. Whisper-toned VO: 'I'm thinking of someone famous…'
3-7s SETUP: POV of a phone in dark room. User taps mic, asks 'Are they alive?' — golden waveform ripples, AI replies 'Yes.' One shard of the silhouette ignites, revealing an eye.
7-11s ESCALATION: Rapid-fire questions ('Athlete?' No. 'Musician?' Yes. 'Still performing?' Yes.) — each answer lights another shard. Question counter ticks down in gold: 8… 5… 3.
11-14s PAYOFF: User whispers a name. The full portrait ignites in golden filigree against the void — correct. A subtle smile, satisfaction beat.
14-15s CTA: Logo + Sphinx eye motif. 'Can you outsmart The Sphinx?' Tap to play.
brief.visual_direction: Mystical Minimalism rendered in near-black (#100D06) negative space, with celebrity portraits constructed from glowing golden-yellow filigree (#D4A024) and luminous highlights (#FCE588) — think gilded shadow-art meets oracle vision. No clutter: a single phone, a single face emerging from darkness, gold light as the only storyteller. Camera stays close and intimate; light reveals are choreographed to each AI answer, swapping the jigsaw archetype's tactile drag-satisfaction for a voice-triggered illumination-satisfaction. Premium, cerebral, slightly occult — the opposite of casual pastel puzzle ads.
brief.rationale: We discard the jigsaw mechanic but keep the archetype's core dopamine driver — incremental reveal toward a satisfying completed image — and translate it into a voice-deduction illumination loop that authentically showcases TheSphinx's actual gameplay. The gold-on-black mystical aesthetic is a scroll-stopper in a feed of bright casual ads, directly targeting the 25-45 intellectual audience who self-select on 'sophisticated' visual cues. UA team: A/B test celebrity silhouettes (musician vs. athlete vs. actor) as the hero reveal — face recognition will be the primary CTR lever.
scenario_prompts: Hero frame, 9:16 vertical aspect ratio, Mystical Minimalism style. A glowing golden filigree portrait of a famous-looking face emerging from pure near-black void (#100D06), constructed from luminous golden-yellow lines (#D4A024) with bright pale-gold highlights (#FCE588) like cracks of light. Half the face is illuminated, half dissolves into darkness. Centered on-screen text in elegant serif gold: 'Can you name them?' Cinematic, premium, oracle-like, sophisticated, no clutter, negative space dominant.

Storyboard frame, 9:16 vertical, Mystical Minimalism. Close-up of hands holding a smartphone in a dark room, screen glowing with a golden voice-waveform ripple on near-black background (#100D06). Soft golden ambient light (#D4A024) on fingertips, pale yellow accent glow (#FCE588) from the screen. Minimalist UI showing a single tap-to-speak mic icon. On-screen overlay text in thin gold serif: 'Ask anything. Yes or no.' Tense, intimate, cerebral mood.

Storyboard frame, 9:16 vertical aspect, Mystical Minimalism aesthetic. A fully revealed celebrity portrait rendered entirely in glowing golden filigree lines (#D4A024) with luminous highlights (#FCE588) against a deep near-black background (#100D06), surrounded by faint constellation-like dots. A small gold counter reads '0 questions left.' Bold gold serif text overlay at bottom: 'Outsmart The Sphinx.' Triumphant, mystical, premium reveal moment.
